# S3 — aactl init Generates Valid Config [PRECONDITION]

Who: The operator.
What: aactl init creates a config file that the broker can use.
Expected: Config file with MODE, ADMIN_SECRET, 0600 perms.

## Test Output

Config written to: /tmp/aa-test-s3/config

Admin secret: EUpxud5Pi05B22GIuWOpDqKcEUjO95gWg-2Av4vvcM0

Dev mode: secret is also stored in the config file.
---

ADMIN_SECRET=EUpxud5Pi05B22GIuWOpDqKcEUjO95gWg-2Av4vvcM0
